title: Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns — Chapter 859
main_description: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 201 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
key_events: The Plan to Strike Big Mom
Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
